message:
✨ SidebarShell component + Epic 6 Supply Chain + ERM nav (#9740)

* ✨ Extract reusable SidebarShell component

Refactors the 672-line monolithic Sidebar into a configurable SidebarShell
that can be reused across contexts (main, enterprise, white-label).

SidebarShell accepts:
- navSections: configurable navigation items
- features: toggle missions, studio, cluster status, etc.
- branding: title/logo for white-label
- All visual features: collapse, pin, resize, mobile, glass effect

Both Sidebar and EnterpriseSidebar now compose SidebarShell.
Enterprise sidebar gains AI missions and Console Studio support.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Epic 6: Supply Chain + ERM nav + portal status updates

- Add SBOM, Sigstore, SLSA dashboards with UnifiedDashboard framework
- Add 3 summary cards + 9 MSW mock endpoints
- Add routes, card registry, catalog entries
- Add ERM section to enterprise nav (Risk Matrix, Register, Appetite)
- Mark Identity & SecOps as active (5 of 7 verticals)
- Remove self-referencing cards from Epic 6 configs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
